calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Set For Trial On Jan-04-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2015 Continued To Jun-17-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. MICHAEL CORBETT of the Law Office of Nikolaus W. Reed, Tel No. (925) 896-5287 appearing for Plaintiff Paul Levine;
Atty. MARSHALL A. COYLE of Gilbert, Kelly, Crowley & Jennet LLP, Tel No. (415) 352-6415 appearing for Defendant Jeffrey Lamata.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JEFFREY LAMATA'S Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint is denied. Plaintiff has sufficiently alleged that defendant acted maliciously and oppressively. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963 (302/HK)
